metadata.title:
Convention of Working Peo-


pie Meets in Arizona to
Plan Campaign to Control
Constitutional Convention
Provisions They Want
in the Fundamental Law.

pages.raw_text:
PHOENIX, Ariz., July 21.-To
rule state in this age of judge
rule, you must write it's constitu-
ton.


The working people want to rule
this new state. Gathering in con-
ference here July II on call of Bis
bee local LOG of the Western FEEDER
alton of Miners, they have launched
campaign to elect a majority of
their number as delegates to the
coming constitutional convention.
They hope their representatives
will outnumber the Santa Fe, South
ern Pacific and other corporation
lawyers, and secure for the new
state of Arizona the most liberal
constitution in the union.


Here are some of the startling
things mentioned as possible pro-
visions of the state constitutions:


Universal and equal suffrage for
all men and women; amendment of
the constitution to be by majority
vote of the people, on the initiative
of either the legislature or the peo-
Pile; legislature to consist of but
one house; property to be taxed at
it's full value; state to have power
to take over property at its as
sessed valuation; state to have
right to engage in business; state
to have right to seize property of
any person, partnership, firm, COM
pany or corporation which violates
the law; law to be declared uncon-
stitutional only by vote of the peo-
pie; state to defray expenses of de-.
Tense as well as prosecution; aboli-
ton of fee system in courts! short
terms for judges; six months resi-
dence necessary to qualify citizen
